description_long: This is a low-top athletic sneaker featuring a combination of white, light pink, and gray panels with a visible air cushioning unit in the midsole. The upper is constructed from a mix of smooth leather and mesh, with pink accents on the lace eyelets, heel tab, and branding. The shoe has a classic lace-up closure with white laces and a padded tongue displaying a pink logo. The midsole is thick and features a transparent window revealing the air cushioning technology, while the outsole is made of durable rubber with a textured tread for traction. The heel displays prominent branding in black against a pink background. The overall design is sporty and stylish, suitable for urban environments and casual wear.
description: A stylish, low-top athletic sneaker in white, pink, and gray with visible air cushioning and prominent branding. Features a mix of leather and mesh, a lace-up closure, and a textured rubber sole.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, white laces, and pink logo on the tongue.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the layered leather and mesh panels, pink eyelets, and visible air unit in the midsole.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the pink heel tab with black branding and the padded collar.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the air unit, layered materials, and pink accents.
attribute_logo: Pink 'Nike Air' logo on tongue and black 'Nike Air' logo on pink heel tab
